overall.description: A cinematic first-person exploration of a luxury cyberpunk apartment at night, featuring teal and magenta neon lighting, panoramic windows overlooking a futuristic cityscape, and ending with the discovery of a seated character. The footage is rendered in a game engine with high-fidelity graphics and atmospheric lighting.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit luxury apartment living room, dominated by a large illuminated aquarium wall casting green light. The camera pans slowly left across white modern furniture, revealing a geometric patterned wall with red accent lights as the space transitions toward the window area.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a panoramic window area with stunning views of a neon-lit cyberpunk cityscape. The camera moves along the window past a glowing indoor plant bed with cyan lighting, while the geometric wall falls behind to the right. The space features polished floors and glass surfaces reflecting the colorful exterior lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: office workspace with desk and holographic display

notable_agents.action: seated in a high-back office chair holding a drink, with a holographic blue fish swimming nearby

projected blue holographic fish swimming in the air near the seated character

segments.scene_description: The camera turns away from the window toward an office area dominated by a large hexagonal ceiling light. As it approaches, a character is revealed seated in an office chair holding a drink, with a holographic blue fish swimming in the air beside them. The glass desk and city view remain visible to the left as the focus shifts to the seated figure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit luxury apartment that transitions from an intimate interior glow to a panoramic urban vista before settling on a mysterious figure. It begins in a living room dominated by the green radiance of a large aquarium wall, panning slowly across white modern furniture and a geometric wall accented with red lights. As the camera moves toward the window area, the scene opens into a stunning view of a neon-lit cyberpunk cityscape, gliding past a cyan-lit indoor plant bed while the polished floors reflect the vibrant exterior colors. The camera then turns away from the glass to enter an office space beneath a large hexagonal ceiling light, shifting focus from the city skyline to a character seated in a chair. Finally, the movement comes to a rest as it reveals the figure holding a drink with a holographic blue fish swimming in the air beside them.
